ucs.title: [LLM] Metador metaMain loader via cdb.exe LOLBin executing debugger script files
ucs.description: Hunts Metador's signature loader pattern: abuse of the Windows Console Debugger (cdb.exe) with the -cf script flag to decrypt and execute the metaMain shellcode payload from disk. SentinelLabs documented this as Metador's distinctive execution chain on telecom/ISP victims in the Middle East and Africa.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_path) as path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.process_name=cdb.exe (Processes.process="*-cf *" OR Processes.process="*-pd*" OR Processes.process="*-pn*" OR Processes.process="*-c \"*") by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name Processes.parent_process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where NOT match(parent_process_name,"(?i)(windbg|devenv|VsDebugConsole|vsjitdebugger)\.exe") | search NOT path IN ("*Windows Kits*","*Visual Studio*","*Debugging Tools*") | `security_content_ctime(firstTime)` | `security_content_ctime(lastTime)`
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where FileName =~ "cdb.exe"
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (" -cf ", " -pd", " -pn ", "-c \"")
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ ("windbg.exe", "devenv.exe", "vsjitdebugger.exe", "VsDebugConsole.exe")
| where FolderPath !contains "Windows Kits" and FolderPath !contains "Visual Studio" and FolderPath !contains "Debugging Tools"
| extend ScriptArg = extract(@"-cf\s+\"?([^\"\s]+)\"?", 1, ProcessCommandLine)
| join kind=leftouter (DeviceFileEvents | where ActionType in ("FileCreated","FileModified") | project DeviceId, ScriptArg=FileName, ScriptCreated=Timestamp, ScriptCreator=InitiatingProcessFileName) on DeviceId, ScriptArg
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessParentFileName, ScriptArg, ScriptCreator, ScriptCreated
| where isnotempty(ScriptArg)
ucs.rationale: cdb.exe outside of dev workstations is rare; Metador (G1013) is one of the only documented espionage actors that weaponizes it as a shellcode loader for metaMain via the -cf script flag. Filtering out legitimate WinDbg parents and SDK install paths reduces FPs to near zero on production telecom/ISP/university servers — exactly Metador's victim profile.

ucs.title: [LLM] Metador Mafalda raw-socket ICMP C2 beacon from server-class hosts
ucs.description: Hunts the second-stage Mafalda implant's command channel: long-running processes on telecom/server-class hosts emitting sustained, low-volume ICMP traffic to external IPs. Metador specifically uses non-application-layer (ICMP) C2 for resilience inside carrier environments where HTTP egress is monitored.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=t count values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dst_ips dc(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dst_count sum(All_Traffic.bytes_out) as bytes_out min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where All_Traffic.transport=icmp All_Traffic.dest_category!=internal by All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.app All_Traffic.process_name _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | stats count as beacon_intervals avg(bytes_out) as avg_bytes dc(dst_ips) as unique_dsts values(process_name) as procs by src app | where beacon_intervals >= 6 AND avg_bytes < 4096 AND unique_dsts <= 3 | join type=inner src [ | tstats summariesonly=t values(Processes.process_name) as suspicious_procs from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("wmiprvse.exe","svchost.exe","services.exe") Processes.process_name!="*.exe" OR Processes.process_path IN ("*\\ProgramData\\*","*\\Users\\Public\\*","*\\Windows\\Temp\\*") by Processes.dest | rename Processes.dest as src ]
ucs.kql:
let beacon_window = 6h;
let candidates = DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(beacon_window)
| where Protocol == "Icmp" or RemotePort == 0
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| summarize beacons = count(), distinct_dsts = dcount(RemoteIP), total_bytes = sum(toint(coalesce(tostring(RemoteIP),"0"))), first=min(Timestamp), last=max(Timestamp), procs = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName), paths = make_set(InitiatingProcessFolderPath)
  by DeviceId, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessId, InitiatingProcessFileName
| where beacons >= 20 and distinct_dsts <= 3
| where datetime_diff('minute', last, first) >= 60;
candidates
| join kind=inner (
    DeviceProcessEvents
    | where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("wmiprvse.exe","svchost.exe","services.exe","explorer.exe")
        or FolderPath has_any (@"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\", @"\Windows\Temp\", @"\PerfLogs\")
    | project DeviceId, ChildProcId=ProcessId, ChildName=FileName, ChildPath=FolderPath, ChildParent=InitiatingProcessFileName
) on DeviceId, $left.InitiatingProcessId == $right.ChildProcId
| project first, last, DeviceName, InitiatingProcessFileName, ChildPath, ChildParent, beacons, distinct_dsts, procs
ucs.rationale: ICMP C2 is uncommon in modern e-crime tradecraft but is a documented Mafalda capability. Combining low-volume ICMP beaconing with a parent-of-svchost/wmiprvse spawning a binary from ProgramData/Public/Temp matches Metador's WMI-event-subscription-launched second stage on telecom infrastructure — environments where ICMP egress is often allowed for monitoring and where Metador has been observed by S
